title: Kuma Strikes Saturn
description: On pages 12–13, this part focuses on Unknown person #10, Bonney, Unknown person #11, Sanji, Marines, Kuma as Kuma arrives at Egghead, Bonney confronts Saturn, Vegapunk is threatened, and the island falls into a full Buster Call-level crisis.
scene: Kuma arrives at Egghead, Bonney confronts Saturn, Vegapunk is threatened, and the island falls into a full Buster Call-level crisis.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Let's put your growth to the test!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Atlas, can you carry him to our meeting point in the Labo- stream?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Now that Kuma's joined us, wouldn't you agree there are too many players on the board?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I think it's about time we wrapped this up...

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: You're a sad, sad man, Kizaru.

dialogue.speaker: Marines
dialogue.text: The Buster Call Protocol has been authorized!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: by the authority of the world government, this island has been declared a threat to the entire world!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Reduce everything to ashes in the name of justice!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...I should've brought a darker pair of shades.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm going to embarrass myself at this rate.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: A traitor who studied the taboo secrets of the world... a survivor of a bloodline that should be extinct...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...and a pirate who awakened the power of that ancient "God." This island has been completely infested.

summary: This part advances the Egghead Buster Call through 19 cleaned dialogue beats, centering the emotional stakes, battle movement, and the wider consequences of Egghead.
